Functions for managing manufacturing mode, checking its status, and performing hardware self-tests.


## Files
- **[mfg_factory_mode.c](mfg_factory_mode.c.md)**: Functions to manage and enter manufacturing mode, including app launching and accessory state handling.
- **[mfg_factory_mode.h](mfg_factory_mode.h.md)**: Functions to enter manufacturing mode and check its status in the Pebble firmware.
- **[mfg_selftest.c](mfg_selftest.c.md)**: Implements manufacturing self-tests for various hardware components with conditional test execution.
